violations.text: Food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
Pet Turtle tank is located on the counter by the cash register. Turtle tank is to be moved to dining room to avoid contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door in. Gaskets are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The lights in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris hood systems must be maintained clean to sight and touch to prevent contamination to food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils knives were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

The cutting boards in the prep unit area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2025
The gasket for the 1 door reach-in was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025

Wood is used in the construction of prep unit. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair ( one door cooler by fryolator). Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2024

The condensate from the chest freezer refrigeration unit was observed in excess. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to defrost freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
